mapper.sql: sbp.id, sbp.entry_time, sbp.department, sbp.administrative_office, sbp.bonus_name, sbp.work_card, sbp.employee_name, sbp.bank_account, sbp.bank_name, sbp.payable_amount, sbp.amount_pre_tax, sbp.deduct_income_tax, sbp.amount_after_tax, sbp.create_time, sbp.create_by, sbp.update_time, sbp.update_by, sbp.se_id, sbp.bonus_id, sbp.enabled_flag, sbp.grant_flag,sbp.cost_center,sbp.cost_center_num,sbp.service_department

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.entry_time as ${tAlias}_entry_time, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.bonus_name as ${tAlias}_bonus_name, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.payable_amount as ${tAlias}_payable_amount, ${tAlias}.amount_pre_tax as ${tAlias}_amount_pre_tax, ${tAlias}.deduct_income_tax as ${tAlias}_deduct_income_tax, ${tAlias}.amount_after_tax as ${tAlias}_amount_after_tax, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id,${tAlias}.bonus_id as ${tAlias}_bonus_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.grant_flag as ${tAlias}_grant_flag, ${tAlias}.cost_center as ${tAlias}_cost_center, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.service_department as ${tAlias}_service_department

select
from swm_bonus_payment sbp left join swm_employee se on sbp.work_card=se.work_card
mapper.insert: insert into swm_bonus_payment (entry_time, department, administrative_office, bonus_name, work_card, employee_name, bank_account, bank_name, payable_amount, amount_pre_tax, deduct_income_tax, amount_after_tax, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, bonus_id, enabled_flag) values (#{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payableAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountPreTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountAfterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{bonusId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update: update swm_bonus_payment set entry_time = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bonus_name = #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payable_amount = #{payableAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_pre_tax = #{amountPreTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_income_tax = #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_after_tax = #{amountAfterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, bonus_id = #{bonusId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType= BIT}, grant_flag = #{grantFlag, jdbcType = BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select sb.bonus_name as bonus_name, sb.month as month, sb.release_time as release_time, sbp.payable_amount as payable_amount, sbp.amount_pre_tax as amount_pre_tax, sbp.deduct_income_tax as deduct_income_tax, sbp.amount_after_tax as amount_after_tax from swm_bonus sb join swm_bonus_payment sbp on sb.id = sbp.bonus_id and sbp.enabled_flag = 1 and sb.enabled_flag = 1 and sbp.grant_flag = 1 join swm_employee se on se.work_card =sbp.work_card and se.work_flag = 1 and se.employee_id = #{criteria.employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into swm_bonus_payment (entry_time, department, administrative_office, bonus_name, work_card, employee_name, bank_account, bank_name, payable_amount, amount_pre_tax, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, bonus_id, enabled_flag,cost_center,cost_center_num,service_department) select se.entry_time, se.department, se.administrative_office, #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, se.work_card,se.name, se.bank_account, se.bank_name,#{money,jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{money,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, getdate (), isnull(#{userEmpId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, -1), getdate (), isnull(#{userEmpId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, -1), se.id,#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, 1,se.cost_center,se.cost_center_num,se.service_department from swm_employee se where se.work_flag = 1
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_bonus_payment where bonus_id = #{bonusId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into swm_bonus_payment (entry_time, department, administrative_office, bonus_name, work_card, employee_name, bank_account, bank_name, payable_amount, amount_pre_tax, deduct_income_tax, amount_after_tax, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, bonus_id, enabled_flag,cost_center,cost_center_num,service_department) select sbpi.entry_time, sbpi.department, sbpi.administrative_office, sbpi.bonus_name, sbpi.work_card, sbpi.employee_name, sbpi.bank_account, sbpi.bank_name, sbpi.payable_amount, sbpi.amount_pre_tax, sbpi.deduct_income_tax, sbpi.amount_after_tax, getdate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, getDate(), #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isnull(se.id,-1), sbpi.bonus_id, 1,sbpi.cost_center,sbpi.cost_center_num,sbpi.service_department from swm_bonus_payment_interface sbpi left join swm_employee se on sbpi.work_card = se.work_card where sbpi.bonus_id = #{bonusId,jdbcType = BIGINT} and sbpi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and sbpi.data_status = 'T' and sbpi.operation_code='C'
mapper.update: update swm_bonus_payment set entry_time=sbpi.entry_time, department=sbpi.department, administrative_office=sbpi.administrative_office, employee_name=sbpi.employee_name, payable_amount = sbpi.payable_amount, amount_pre_tax = sbpi.amount_pre_tax, deduct_income_tax = sbpi.deduct_income_tax, amount_after_tax = sbpi.amount_after_tax, update_time = getdate(), update_by = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, bank_account = sbpi.bank_account, bank_name = sbpi.bank_name,cost_center=sbpi.cost_center, cost_center_num=sbpi.cost_center_num,service_department=sbpi.service_department from swm_bonus_payment_interface sbpi, swm_bonus_payment sbp where sbpi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and sbpi.data_status = 'T' AND RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sbpi.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sbp.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and sbp.bonus_id = sbpi.bonus_id and sbp.enabled_flag = 1 and sbpi.operation_code='U'
mapper.select: select sb.bonus_name, sb.release_time, sb.money, sbp.work_card, sbp.employee_name, sbp.department, sbp.administrative_office, sbp.bank_account, sbp.payable_amount, sbp.amount_pre_tax, sbp.deduct_income_tax, sbp.amount_after_tax from swm_bonus sb join swm_bonus_payment sbp on sb.id = sbp.bonus_id where sb.enabled_flag = 1 and sbp.enabled_flag = 1 and sb.id = #{id , jdbcType = BIGINT} order by sbp.department, sbp.administrative_office, sbp.work_card
